description_long: This is a mid-rise brick apartment building with four stories, featuring a flat dark roof and a symmetrical facade. The front side displays two main entry doors accessed by a short staircase, with a small patch of grass and a tree to the right. The rear of the building is more ornate, with a series of bay windows and balconies, as well as a landscaped area with flower beds. The side walls are plain and windowless, emphasizing the building's urban, row-house character. The windows are regularly spaced and vertically aligned, with arched frames on the uppermost floor. The structure is primarily constructed from red brick, with white balcony railings and window frames adding contrast.
description: A four-story red brick apartment building with symmetrical windows, balconies, and landscaped front and rear areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, a grassy area, and a large tree to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a plain, windowless brick wall and part of the landscaped rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting bay windows, balconies, and a landscaped patio with flower beds.
description_view_3: Right side view with another plain, windowless brick wall and a partial view of the front steps and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced across the facade, with arched windows on the top floor and grouped bay windows at the rear.
